chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1061 of 2021 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No.4440/2021 2. For hearing of main case 23.04.2025 Messrs. Hamza Waheed and Sami-ur-Rehman, advocates for the petitioner Mr. Mukesh Kumar Khatri, advocate for respondent Mr. Akbar Khan, Assistant Attorney General On the last date following order was passed: “Per learned counsel for the petitioner, this matter is squarely covered by the Division Bench Judgment of this Court dated 30.04.2021 passed in C.P.No.D-8584/2017 and connected matters. Learned counsel for the respondent seeks time to obtain instructions. At his request adjourned to 23.04.2025. Interim order passed earlier to continue till next date” Today learned counsel for respondent states upon instructions that this controversy is covered as mentioned aforesaid and may be disposed of for the same reasons and upon the same terms as Division Bench judgment of this court dated 30.04.2021 passed in CP D 8584/2017 and connected matters. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
